nodes.name: Red-vented malimbe
nodes.summary: The red-vented malimbe (Malimbus scutatus) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is found in Benin, Cameroon, Ivory Coast, Ghana, Guinea, Liberia, Nigeria, Sierra Leone, and Togo. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical swamps. References External links Red-vented malimbe - Species text in Weaver Watch.
